summary.trigger_source: climate exposure / underwriting repricing / market withdrawal

build_phases.name: Foundation
build_phases.objective: Establish contracts, ingestion, routing, traceability, and result schema.

build_phases.name: Sector Data Foundation
build_phases.objective: Establish climate-loss, exposure, underwriting, and catastrophe-risk data foundations.

build_phases.name: Core Intelligence
build_phases.objective: Implement sector-aware analysis engines and signal propagation.

build_phases.name: Sector Design Layer
build_phases.objective: Generate the climate-insurance risk intelligence design layer.

build_phases.name: Validation
build_phases.objective: Validate underwriting, repricing, exposure, and catastrophe-risk outputs before operational deployment.

build_phases.name: Portfolio Packaging
build_phases.objective: Prepare artifacts for portfolio, binder, strategic review, and buyer-specific diligence.

build_phases.name: Breakthrough Acceleration
build_phases.objective: Prioritize advanced validation for the climate insurance risk intelligence platform.
